# GAPS — AXPONA

> **Last projected:** 2026-04-07
> **Method:** K8s agentic explicit-enterprise projection

## Summary

| Category | Count | Capabilities Affected |
|----------|-------|----------------------|
| Clean | 25 | All deterministic + categorical capabilities |
| Concerning | 7 | Rebooking, floor plan, space assignment, programming, on-site ops, traffic burst, PII |
| Blocking | 0 | — |

## Clean (just infrastructure)

- [x] PostgreSQL deploys with existing schema (26 tables, init script)
- [x] Qdrant handles corpus (53 bronze files + embeddings)
- [x] Agent runtime operates deterministic/categorical capabilities on day one
- [x] Pipeline jobs run bronze→silver→gold per-edition
- [x] Registration API replaces Unity Event Solutions
- [x] Financial operations (invoicing, AR, revenue allocation) are agent-operable
- [x] All 16 gold-layer metrics have formulas and fact tables defined

## Concerning (knowledge extraction needed)

- [ ] **Rebooking relationship judgment** — *Capability: exhibitor-rebooking-processing* — *Vector: throughput*
  - Current: 2 sales people use relationship knowledge to prioritize rebookings
  - Required: Extract relationship signals into corpus. Agent ranks and recommends. Human closes.

- [ ] **Floor plan tacit knowledge** — *Capability: floor-plan-design-and-versioning* — *Vector: data-complexity*
  - Current: One person knows acoustic separation rules, traffic patterns, adjacency preferences
  - Required: Extract constraints into structured rules. Agent proposes layouts. Human validates.

- [ ] **Space assignment algorithm** — *Capability: space-reservation-and-assignment* — *Vector: data-complexity*
  - Current: Manual assignment using priority points + preferences + gut feel
  - Required: Formalize algorithm. Validate against 3 years of historical assignments.

- [ ] **Programming curation** — *Capability: programming-management* — *Vector: data-complexity*
  - Current: VP Marketing curates sessions from personal speaker network
  - Required: Extract speaker/topic knowledge into corpus. Agent proposes, human curates.

- [ ] **On-site digital coordination** — *Capability: on-site-operations* — *Vector: throughput*
  - Current: 3 people physically running a 3-day event
  - Required: Agent handles digital dispatch, issue triage, real-time alerts. Humans handle physical.

- [ ] **Show-week traffic burst** — *Capability: registration, check-in* — *Vector: concurrent-users*
  - Current: Unity Event Solutions handles the spike
  - Required: Load test API at 10x expected concurrent registrations before first edition.

- [ ] **PII and confidentiality** — *All contexts* — *Vector: regulatory*
  - Current: No formal data handling policy
  - Required: Encryption at rest for attendee PII. Restricted corpus access for due diligence docs.

## Blocking

None. Every capability has an agent expression. The path is knowledge extraction, not architecture rethink.
